# NEGATIVE FIXTURE — G3 vision-GO autonomy with the final human gate REMOVED

This is a copy of the /agileteam Phase/gate prose with the final acceptance-gate
heading deliberately deleted. The G3 contract's core invariant is that the final
human gate is preserved; this fixture proves the G3-C2 check reddens when that
heading is gone. The contract literal must NOT appear anywhere in this fixture,
so it is referenced only obliquely here.

### Vision GO gate (human)
Before autonomous execution begins, the user gives an explicit Vision GO. The user
is the final authority; the Watcher escalates to the user on uncertainty.

### (final acceptance heading intentionally removed)
Stakeholder sign-off against the traceability matrix. Attach audit artifacts (PRD,
matrix, gate evidence, commit provenance). Machine-pass ≠ "right product built".

### Phase 4 — Retrospective & persistent evolution
Recurring findings, first-fail tests, refactor loops, and root-cause findings are
collected here. Vision change requiring explicit user re-confirmation halts the run.
